title: Magnificently Crunchy Korean Noodles Kalguksu
description: A floral, crunchy, and indulgent Korean dish from the Gyeongsang region, featuring sesame seed oil and a pasta-water-emulsion, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, served in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot and cook the Kalguksu noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame seed oil over medium heat and sauté the sliced zucchini and carrots until they are tender.
Add the chopped green onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the vegetable broth and 1 cup of the pasta water to create a pasta-water-emulsion.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2 minutes, combining with the vegetable mixture.
Pour the pasta-water-emulsion into the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Divide the noodle mixture among individual mini cocottes.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the top of each cocotte.
